Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad

Class FlixelGamepadManager

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad.FlixelGamepadManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.controllers.ControllerListener, FlixelInputManager
public final class FlixelGamepadManager extends Object implements FlixelInputManager, com.badlogic.gdx.controllers.ControllerListener
Global gamepad manager backed by gdx-controllers. Polls controllers each frame and mirrors the keyboard and mouse frame contract from FlixelGame.

Use logical button and axis constants from FlixelGamepadInput (for example FlixelGamepadInput.A) with pressed(int, int); each Controller.getMapping() supplies native indices. FlixelGamepadDevice is optional; call ensureDevice(int) once per slot you want a facade for.

    FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadConnectedEvent
    Mutable payload reused for deviceConnected; do not retain past the callback.
    static final class 
    FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadDisconnectedEvent
    Mutable payload reused for deviceDisconnected; do not retain past the callback.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_GAMEPADS

      public static final int MAX_GAMEPADS
      Maximum supported simultaneous controllers.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • enabled

      public boolean enabled
      When false, all queries return inactive state.

    • numActiveGamepads

      public int numActiveGamepads
      Number of controllers mapped to IDs 0 .. numActiveGamepads-1 this frame.

    • globalDeadZone

      @Nullable public @Nullable Float globalDeadZone
      Optional analog dead zone applied to all axis reads when non-null. When null, only exact zeroing for true zero input is skipped.

    • deviceConnected

      @NotNull public final @NotNull FlixelSignal<FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadConnectedEvent> deviceConnected

    • deviceDisconnected

      @NotNull public final @NotNull FlixelSignal<FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadDisconnectedEvent> deviceDisconnected

    • FlixelGamepadManager

      public FlixelGamepadManager()

  • Method Details

    • attach

      public void attach()
      Registers a ControllerListener with gdx-controllers. Safe to call more than once.

    • detach

      public void detach()
      Unregisters listeners and clears internal slot state.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelInputManager
      Clears internal state. Default implementation does nothing.
      Specified by:
      reset in interface FlixelInputManager

    • update

      public void update()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelInputManager
      Reads hardware state and refreshes internal snapshots for this frame.
      Specified by:
      update in interface FlixelInputManager

    • endFrame

      public void endFrame()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelInputManager
      Finalizes this frame after gameplay and draw hooks run. Typically, it copies the current snapshot into the previous snapshot used on the next frame for edge detection.
      Specified by:
      endFrame in interface FlixelInputManager

    • getById

      @Nullable public @Nullable FlixelGamepadDevice getById(int id)
      Returns the cached FlixelGamepadDevice for a slot if the game previously called ensureDevice(int).
      Parameters:
      id - Slot id.
      Returns:
      Cached device, or null.

    • ensureDevice

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelGamepadDevice ensureDevice(int id)
      Ensures a FlixelGamepadDevice exists for the given slot. At most one instance is created per id for the lifetime of this manager (until reset()).
      Parameters:
      id - Slot id.
      Returns:
      Non-null device facade.

    • getFirstActiveGamepadId

      public int getFirstActiveGamepadId()
      First slot with any button beyond dead zone or analog movement this frame, or -1.
      Returns:
      Active id, or -1 when none.

    • getFirstActiveGamepad

      @Nullable public @Nullable FlixelGamepadDevice getFirstActiveGamepad()
      Returns a device for getFirstActiveGamepadId() only when that slot was already ensured.
      Returns:
      Device, or null.

    • getActiveGamepadIds

      public int getActiveGamepadIds(@Nullable @org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable int[] reuseOut)
      Writes active slot ids in order to reuseOut[0 .. count-1].
      Parameters:
      reuseOut - Caller buffer; length should be at least MAX_GAMEPADS.
      Returns:
      Number of ids written.

    • getActiveGamepads

      public int getActiveGamepads(@Nullable @Nullable FlixelGamepadDevice[] reuseOut)
      Fills reuseOut with FlixelGamepadDevice instances that were previously ensured and are still connected.
      Parameters:
      reuseOut - Caller buffer.
      Returns:
      Number of entries written.
